summary.what_built: This module creates a new API endpoint for retrieving the current portfolio snapshot.
summary.problem: It solves the need for a simple way to access portfolio data in JSON format.
summary.risk: Medium risk due to the lack of dynamic data sources, which may lead to issues if real-time data integration is needed later.
summary.validation: The code has been checked for basic functionality and adheres to the specified design.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the new API endpoint will be added to the application.
summary.uncertainty: There is uncertainty about how this static data will perform in a live environment and whether future data integration will be handled smoothly.
